fixes: Engine stopped after server tsx-watch restart: health check caught server unresponsive + feed frozen since 06:41Z (~2.5h stale). Server recovered on its own (HTTP started responding). Engine state was 'stopped' — issued POST /api/engine/start, engine resumed at cycle 400. GCP XGBoost model from job #322 applied (R²=0.828). No code change needed — this was a post-restart engine stop, not a code bug. Feed expected to recover within 1-2 cycles.

SG sweep DB zombie storm: Phase 10 runs 8 candidates sequentially (up to 12 min), each with 30s MP fetch + 90s DFT timeout. During these async waits, all 10 pool connections exceed idleTimeoutMillis (10s) and go zombie. SG sweep then started with a pool of dead connections → 'Connection terminated due to connection timeout' (62251ms) on /api/research-logs. Fix: added drainIdleConnections() at the very start of SG sweep try block (before 25s wait, line ~9246 in engine.ts), clearing Phase 10 zombie connections before the 967-candidate sweep begins. Server had restarted naturally via tsx watch (PID 82364 → 4039) during investigation; feed confirmed active.

Event loop blocked ~6 min (feed frozen since 04:48Z, HTTP exit 56): fast path screening loop (line 6743) called runAutonomousDiscoveryCycle WITHOUT fastSweepMode:true. SCREENING_BATCH_SIZE=12 candidates run concurrently, each calling runFullPhysicsAnalysis → resolveDFTFeatures (90s timeout). All 12 fired simultaneously at T+0, all 12 timeouts completed at T+90s, then 12 concurrent analytical physics computations blocked the event loop. Fix: added fastSweepMode:true to the call at line 6743 so the fast path exits after GB surrogate check only (same as SG sweep at line 9341). Full physics analysis runs in Phase 10 for accepted candidates. Engine stop/start to restore feed.

SG sweep 17+ min blockage (4th occurrence): root-cause code fix applied. physicsPredictor.predict() in runAutonomousDiscoveryCycle() was calling resolveDFTFeatures + mpClient.fetchAllData (30s MP timeout + 90s physics computation = 78-108s per candidate), blocking the event loop during SG sweep of 967 candidates. The fastSweepMode early-return was placed AFTER this call (line 5334), not before — so it never prevented the blocking. Fix: moved fastSweepMode return to BEFORE physicsPredictor.predict() (after crossEngineHub.recordInsight). SG sweep now returns after GB surrogate check (~<1s per candidate) with no physics blocking. Force-killed PID 99648 (557 CPU-s, 1.84 GB heap) → PID 10804.

SG sweep persisted past 8-min wall limit (candidates 2-4 each took 78-108s, blocking event loop). Pool zombie storm: ECONNRESET, 'timeout exceeded when trying to connect'. Engine stop API was unresponsive (curl exit 56 — event loop blocked). Force-killed PID 17920 → PID 99648. Feed confirmed active at cycle 400.

DB pool zombie storm post-restart: after engine stop/start at ~11:37 PM, pool accumulated zombie connections causing 'Authentication timed out' and 'Connection terminated' errors for 10+ minutes. Research log circuit breaker opened, updatePhaseStatus failing on cycle #400. Code fix: added drainIdleConnections() call at the very start of startEngine() in engine.ts (before any DB operations), so each engine start begins with a clean pool. Server restarted (PID 50328 → PID 25112). Heap cleared from 889MB to 132MB on restart.

Feed frozen ~15 min — engine stuck at cycle 397. DB pool zombie connections from extended SG sweep event loop blockage: Neon closed TLS sockets during ~17min sweep; Node.js idle/socket timers couldn't fire while loop was blocked. PowerShell Stop-Process to kill PID 85208 → PID 50328. Code fix: added drainIdleConnections() to db.ts; imported and called it in engine.ts SG sweep finally-block, so all idle zombie connections are cleared immediately after every sweep before the next engine cycle begins.

Activity feed unavailable — event loop fully blocked by SG sweep (967 candidates), engine stop request timed out. Code fixes from cycle 959 also hadn't taken effect (tsx watch didn't restart). Force-killed PID 75884 → PID 85208, restoring feed and applying code changes.

Recurring null.featureMask error at engine cycle 395: strengthened null guard in predictWithModel() (strict === null/undefined + typeof check); added null guard in buildFeatureImportanceCache() ensemble model iteration (line 1780: if (!ensModel) continue); fixed unguarded m.trees.length access in getXGBEnsembleStats() (line 1818: m?.trees?.length ?? 0).

Health check false positive: stale pre-fix log line 459 ('[Active Learning] Error at cycle 395: Cannot read properties of null') was within the tail-500 window (log had 679 lines). Two fixes: (1) scripts/qae-monitor-check.sh — added '[express] not in line' exclusion for runtime error detection. (2) Reduced tail window from 500 to 200 lines.

Null/undefined access in Active Learning cycle 395: 'Cannot read properties of null (reading featureMask)'. Fix: added ensemble.models.filter(m => m != null) guard in predictEnsembleXGB(); added early return for empty validModels array.
Activity feed unavailable — tsx watch hot-reload left old pool sockets open. Force-killed PID 23776 → PID 4597.
Proactive fix: engine.ts — added lastSGSweepAttemptMs guard to prevent duplicate overlapping SG sweeps on engine stop/start.
Feed FROZEN false positives — raised FEED_FREEZE_MINUTES from 5 to 12 min in qae-monitor-check.sh.
Feed frozen 22+ min — zombie connections cascading. Force-killed PID 101680 → PID 23776.
Feed FROZEN false-positive — raised HTTP-blocked freeze threshold from >10 min to >20 min in qae-monitor-check.sh.
Feed frozen ~20 min — 2 consecutive full retrains blocking event loop. Added 25s post-retrain cool-down in gradient-boost.ts. Force-killed PID 36020 → PID 101680.
Feed FROZEN ~17 min — pool reconnection burst. Reduced db.ts max pool 20→10. Force-killed PID 79344 → PID 36020.
Feed FROZEN ~12 min — Phase 7 extractFeatures blocking during SG sweep. Added isSGSweepActive guard + skipStructurePrediction. Force-killed PID 66204 → PID 79344.
Feed FROZEN ~20 min — surrogateScreen blocking. Added yield before extractFeatures in gradient-boost.ts. Force-killed PID 27432 → PID 66204.
Feed frozen 17 min — SG sweep hit zombie connections. Added 25s await at start of runSGSweep(). Force-killed PID 43980 → PID 27432.
